subject: [PATCH v3 08/10] fuse: support registered buffers as buffer pools in io-uring

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for using registered buffers as buffer pools in io-uring, allowing servers to use the same pinned pages for subsequent I/O operations and reducing overhead. Registered buffers require enabling the FUSE_URING_BUFPOOL flag and setting the FUSE_URING_REGISTERED_BUFFERS init flag during registration. The patch also includes benchmark results showing a 10% throughput improvement for direct randreads and other improvements for different types of reads.
